glossary.subject: {{mappings.orderType}} started for device {{mappings.deviceName}} for site {{mappings.siteId}} with change ticket {{ mappings.ticketNumber }}
glossary.subtitle:
Hello,

The {{mappings.orderType}} for device {{mappings.deviceName}} at site {{mappings.siteId}} has started with DNE order no: {{mappings.orderNumber}} with change ticket {{mappings.ticketNumber}}.
Please check {{ mappings.url }} for more details.

Thank You
